description: Census income (>50K/<=50K) by demographic and occupation attributes
proposed_title: UCI Adult Census Income: Sex vs. Income by Education Level (1994)
encoding_note: No header row; columns are: age, workclass, fnlwgt, education, education-num, marital-status, occupation, relationship, race, sex, capital-gain, capital-loss, hours-per-week, native-country, income. Binary outcome: income=">50K" as success. Aggregate Successes=count(income>50K) and Cases=count(*) per (sex × education) cell.
